note: EA::Reflection class names; registration is code-driven (string xrefs land in .text, e.g. EngineRacer@0x4886F1, AICopManager constructors @0x3CAEA..). Field name->offset->type maps are built at runtime by these constructors, NOT in a static data table. NtaD record keys are NOT inline Joaat/Bin hashes of ErtS strings (tested: <0.2% match at every aligned offset).
